description: ETF Constituent Pull-Through. For each ETF with |z|>=1.5σ, pulls top 50 holdings from Polygon ETF Global Constituents endpoint, computes per-stock implied flow pressure aggregated across all high-z ETFs. Writes etf-flows/constituent-pressure.json + per-ETF archives.

schedule.name: justhodl-etf-constituents-daily
schedule.description: 17:45 ET daily — 45min after flow engine, after macro regime, after AI strategist
